ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are relevant and consistent with persona but could be more natural in tone to reflect the urgency of access.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Follows strict protocol, lacks immediate context relevance due to absence of specific instructions or requests from Player Input.
